title: Checkout failures spiking — payments timing out
summary: Checkout success rate dropped from ~99% to ~40% beginning around 14:02 UTC. Users report errors at the payment step. checkout-service is emitting 5xx; payment-gateway is the named dependency.

ground_truth.root_cause: payment-gateway's upstream payment processor started timing out (~30s). checkout-service calls payment-gateway synchronously, so those calls exceed the timeout and return 5xx, cascading into a checkout failure spike. The fault originates upstream of payment-gateway, not in checkout-service itself.
key_evidence: payment-gateway logs: 'upstream payment processor timeout after 30000ms' returning 504
checkout-service logs: 'payment-gateway call failed: 504 Gateway Timeout' returning 502
trace shows POST /checkout at ~30500ms with an errored payment-gateway 'charge' span (~30000ms) waiting on the processor
expected_fix_themes: lower/bound the payment-gateway upstream timeout so it fails fast
decouple checkout from the synchronous payment call (async, queue, or circuit breaker with fallback)
add bounded retries with backoff + idempotency keys, and surface a clear user-facing error instead of a hang
